creator: freebsd.contact@marino.st
text:
On 4/20/2014 13:47, James Bailie wrote:
> Make makesum. Tarball is correct.
> 

This hash should be provided to the PR first.
Imagine that the tarball got switched maliciously before a committer got
a chance to "make makesum" and they accidentally blessed an
intentionally compromised tarball.

This is why digests exist in the first place -- to be 100% sure that
downloaded file is what was intended.

John
